question: Find the number of visitors who did not visit any museum opened after 2010.
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM visitor WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT t2.visitor_id FROM museum AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.Museum_ID  =  t2.Museum_ID WHERE t1.open_year  >  2010)
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitor WHERE key NOT IN (SELECT T1.attr_127870_key FROM visit AS T1 JOIN museum AS T2 ON T1.attr_eb0ea0_key = T2.attr_eb0ea0_key WHERE T2.attr_7cef8a_calendar_year > 2010);
raw_response: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitor WHERE key NOT IN (SELECT T1.attr_127870_key FROM visit AS T1 JOIN museum AS T2 ON T1.attr_eb0ea0_key = T2.attr_eb0ea0_key WHERE T2.attr_7cef8a_calendar_year > 2010);
